Operating expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Explicit direct cost line; standard COGS concept.

candidates.row_label: Other Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Appears to be a subcomponent of COGS rather than the full total.
Duplicate/alias of total COGS with identical values to Cost of goods and services sold.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Chose the explicit COGS line. 'Cost of revenues/COGS' is a duplicate alias with identical values.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component.
Administrative amortization-related component; excluded because amortization/intangible expense should not be in SG&A components.
Administrative depreciation/lease-related component; excluded because depreciation-like expense should not be in SG&A components.
Likely duplicate/empty malformed label; less reliable than properly labeled Administration expenses.
Likely subcomponent within Administration expenses; prefer broader component row over nested detail.

Potential overhead component, but preview provides no values and could overlap with other functional expense classifications.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly missed a key SG&A row: 'Sales and marketing expenses' is present in the A-column and is a standard SG&A component. Selected it together with 'Administration expenses'. Excluded depreciation/amortization-related admin subrows and excluded 'Total Operating Expense' because totals are not allowed. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales and marketing expenses

Amortization balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.why: Supplemental subcomponent, not preferred main reported line.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to the shareholers of the parent company
candidates.why: Explicit parent/owner equity excluding minority interest; ideal BE choice.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to holdings without a controlling influence
candidates.why: This is non-controlling interest, not BE.
